message:
style: Apply rustfmt formatting to test files

Automated formatting fixes from cargo fmt:

## tests/net_tcp.rs

- Consolidate thread::spawn closure onto fewer lines
- Consistent formatting for assert!() macro with message

## tests/pool_tests.rs

- Reformat acquire_resource() function signature with complex generic bounds
- Split long where clause across multiple lines for readability
- Reformat expect() chain for try_acquire()

## tests/stream_e2e.rs

- Group related imports in use statement (merge, BroadcastStream, etc.)
- Multi-line formatting for long import list

No functional changes - purely formatting for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
